parameters.jsCode: const raw = $input.first().json; let input; try { input = JSON.parse(raw.query || '{}'); } catch (error) { input = { content: raw.query || raw.content || '' }; } const content = String(input.content || raw.content || raw.query || '').trim(); const category = String(input.category || raw.category || 'general'); const importance = Math.max(1, Math.min(10, Number(input.importance || raw.importance || 5))); return [{ json: { content, category, importance, contentEscaped: content.replace(/'/g, "''"), categoryEscaped: category.replace(/'/g, "''") } }];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO memory_long (content, category, importance, metadata) VALUES ('{{ $json.contentEscaped }}', '{{ $json.categoryEscaped }}', {{ $json.importance }}, '{"source":"openclaw"}'::jsonb) RETURNING content, category, importance

parameters.jsCode: const saved = $input.first().json; return [{ json: { result: `Saved memory in category ${saved.category || 'general'}.` } }];
